1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px viewport canvas framework with dense component properties)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Split Horizontal Partition Screen (Left Column Master View: Vendor Outlays Liabilities Data Grid & Aging Control Center Panel; Right Column Detail View: Vendor Bill Auditing Workbench & Three-Way Matching Log Checklist Container; Top Bar: Global Procurement Action Strips for Dispatching Settlements)

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Maintains multi-pane layout to simultaneously check procurement line discrepancies)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (Collapses the vendor bill auditing pane into an explicit tab element overlay view)

key_visible_sections.title: Accounts Payable Subledger Vendor Bills Log

user_progression_routes.on_load: Verify active subledger routing tokens -> Hydrate open liabilities datasets -> Execute data payload fetch from ApArSubledgerService.getApVendorBills()
user_progression_routes.on_bill_click: Populate three_way_match_validator with corresponding upstream logistics documents (PO record lines, Warehouse Receipt quantities, and incoming Invoice records)

redirection_rules.condition: If a transaction balance variance or a line item price mismatch flag overrides standard tolerance margins (> 2.0%)
redirection_rules.action: Lock user control flow inputs completely for settlement generation and toggle visual layout state wrapper elements to 'Discrepancy Exception Block Active'

modal_and_drawer_overlays.trigger: User hits element button context tracking identifier 'btn_dispatch_payment'
modal_and_drawer_overlays.behavior: Pop structural system check modal overlay requesting bank account authorization parameter signatures to execute money wire transfers

molecules.composition: Combines document status circle indicator atom + structural tracking string label (e.g., PO-84920 Quantity Row vs Receipt-9921 Quantity Row) + inline mismatch variance deviation calculation value parameters
Combines vendor metadata avatar string label + aggregated balance liability text box rows + operational credit validation metric badges

organisms.composition: Virtual row scrolling layout parsing incoming vendor bills: bill numbers sequence keys, vendor target identifiers tracking, origin logistics identifiers mapping (`purchase_order_id`, `scm_receipt_id`), currency codes parameters, tax valuation totals, and inline life-cycle tokens (`PaymentStatus` [Open, Partial, Paid]).

Transactional modal interface housing corporate ledger bank source selectors, payment methods arrays checkboxes, currency exchange locks, and execution triggers emitting outgoing microservice event strings.

typography_tokens.font_family_stack: Inter UI, system-ui, sans-serif (Engineered strictly to coordinate massive transactional tabular text lines layout spaces)

color_palette_hex.background_canvas_base: #0B0F19 (Deep Obsidian Enterprise Tech Dark Mode Base Layout Grid)
color_palette_hex.disbursement_action_emerald: #10B981 (Emerald Green Core Payment Dispatches Trigger Fill Accent)
color_palette_hex.discrepancy_exception_crimson: #EF4444 (Crimson Red Exception Alert Highline Border Token)
color_palette_hex.logistics_document_slate: #475569 (Slate Gray Muted Subdued Subledger Metadata Typography Accent)

spacing_and_borders.table_row_vertical_padding: 0.5rem (8px compact dense rows optimizing multi-column spatial allocations)
spacing_and_borders.border_radius_tokens: 0.375rem (6px modern industrial clean hard corner metrics layouts)

micro_interactions.style_mutation: border-left: 4px solid #3B82F6 inline manipulation layer; background-color transformation targets value #1E293B over a 100ms timing constraint curve
opacity value shifts downward to 0.45; cursor values swap structural configurations instantly matching target 'not-allowed' style specifications

accessibility_aria_roles.vendor_liabilities_tabular_grid_viewport: role='grid' housing dynamic accessible row selection indexing rules matrices mapping rows fields directly
accessibility_aria_roles.three_way_match_validator: role='region' accompanied by explicit aria-live='assertive' configuration properties parameters targeting real-time document mismatch alerts monitoring blocks

vendor_bill_records_collection.vendor_name: Global Industrial Steel Logistics Supply Inc

vendor_bill_records_collection.discrepancy_details_string: Logistics Line Match Error: Unit price on vendor invoice ($12.50) exceeds approved price limit threshold parameters on SCM Purchase Order contract ($10.00) by 25.00%.

local_reactive_state_variables.selected_bill_object_pointer_id: Tracks target active vendor bill index row data identifier key used to populate matching metrics inside checklists columns (string | null default pointer value)
local_reactive_state_variables.is_disbursement_terminal_visible: Boolean state variable tracking rendering state boundaries for layout system modal overlays wrapping outlays disbursement triggers
local_reactive_state_variables.ap_mismatch_override_auth_token: Secure alphanumeric string logging supervisor authorization overrides enabling payment clearances across flagged rows (string | null)

global_application_context_bindings.active_selected_legal_entity_id: Shared application instance tenant domain tracking code routing secure microservice requests parameters scopes across runtimes
global_application_context_bindings.asynchronous_scm_receipt_staged_buffer: Local collection layer processing immediate system UI toast alerts notifications when new procurement operations drop on the Kafka mesh

8_technical_requirements.frontend_technical_constraints: Vanilla HTML5 document markup combined with standard Tailwind CSS utility grid classes using modern ES6 functional JavaScript scripts structured with precision mathematical rounding wrappers (`Intl.NumberFormat` accounting configurations) ensuring clean visual financial data representations without precision losses
8_technical_requirements.performance_benchmarks: Hydration timelines mapping complex multi-document data objects inside three_way_match_validator cards layout elements must resolve processing operations within 15ms following a user click sequence event

element_interaction_links.target_mutation_action: Bind return logistics tracking validation data arrays directly inside local fields arrays caches and flip state tracking variable selected_bill_object_pointer_id configuration to illuminate checklist side panels
Set state variable is_disbursement_terminal_visible parameter value flag to true to present layout system payment disbursement modal terminal frames instantly on screen layers

Push workflow command processing packets; update matched row item parameters inline tracking variables updating indicators properties to `PAID` within local records data caches layers; turn off terminal modal flags

element_interaction_links.navigates_to_route: /finance/fixed-assets (Directs router location forward into Screen 5 Capitalized Equipment Management Vault)
